caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storms Bring Rain
caribbean.paragraph: St. Lucia is experiencing 82% rain probability with winds of 12 kt and wave heights of 5.4 ft, while St. Maarten is seeing winds of 21 kt. I expect the Lesser Antilles to bear the brunt of this system, with St. Lucia being the top impact port due to the high rain probability and moderate wave conditions.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storm Hits Cadiz
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds reaching 22 kt and wave heights of 7.7 ft, while Barcelona has a less intense situation with winds of 12 kt. I expect the strong winds and high waves in Cadiz to impact port operations, with the dominant swell direction coming from the WSW at a swell period of 14 s.
